message:
fix(core,vdbe): ORDER BY alias, CASE in GROUP BY, IN subquery rewrite, scalar min/max NULL

Four conformance fixes:

1. VDBE codegen: resolve_sort_key now checks result column aliases
   for ORDER BY terms (e.g. ORDER BY total where total is a computed alias)

2. GROUP BY: relax non-aggregate expression check to match SQLite behavior
   (SQLite allows CASE and other expressions over GROUP BY columns)

3. VDBE path: eagerly rewrite IN-subqueries with GROUP BY/HAVING before
   codegen, since the probe-based IN handler cannot compile them

4. From-less aggregate: scalar min/max (2+ args) now dispatch through
   the scalar function registry (NULL-propagating) instead of the
   aggregate path (NULL-skipping)

Tests: 1572 core pass (+8), 0 fail, clippy+fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
